my_thoughts: My intent says 'Addresses the practical fear (family suffering/wit...' but the student is in clinging_to_role_based_identity. Am I trying to shift their frame or are they already shifting? The none mechanism suggests I'm doing something, but maybe they're doing it to themselves and I'm just naming it.
accumulated_insight: Building on T1: Initial observation: Student in ethical_dissonance showing social_guilt, dualist... Now seeing clinging_to_role_based_identity with none. Pattern emerging.
visible_response:
You do not have to withdraw from them, only from your fantasies about them.
Be fully present, free of anxiety and claims; then your actions will be simple and kind.
